description: Bitcoin MCP server — 43 tools for fees, mempool, blocks, mining, price. Zero config.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.Bortlesboat/bitcoin-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Bitcoin Core RPC port (default: auto-selected by network)
environmentVariables.name: BITCOIN_RPC_PORT

environmentVariables.description: Bitcoin network: mainnet, testnet, signet, or regtest (default: mainnet). Sets default RPC port if BITCOIN_RPC_PORT is not set.
environmentVariables.name: BITCOIN_NETWORK

environmentVariables.description: Override the default hosted API URL (default: https://bitcoinsapi.com). The hosted API is used automatically when no local node is detected.
environmentVariables.name: SATOSHI_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: API key for authenticated access to the hosted Satoshi API (get one free at POST /api/v1/register)
environmentVariables.name: SATOSHI_API_KEY

title: Bitcoin MCP
